error_signature: MCP client node transfers into an error state
title: MCP Client Node Error Handling Issue
symptom: The MCP client node enters an error state, but the AI agent reports success instead of the error message. This leads to incorrect outputs in the workflow.
applies_when: Error messages are returned by the MCP server
not_this_if: MCP server returns standard conform tool error messages
root_cause: The MCP implementation was not returning error messages in a standard format, causing the n8n client node to ignore them. This results in the agent not receiving the correct error feedback, leading to misleading success messages.
fix_steps: Modify the MCP server implementation to return standard conform error messages.
Wrap tool calls in a try-except block to handle errors and return them in the expected format.
agent_instruction: Ensure the MCP server returns standard error messages and handle errors in the client code.
